title: DS5 Quantization & Placement Manifest
description: M4 placement/quant manifest for Qwen3-235B-A22B: per-expert node, residency tier, quant type, and provenance into expert_stats.json. See docs/specs/DS5_Quant_Manifest_v0.1.md. Field names align with docs/specs/schemas/expert_stats.schema.json (WP-1).

model_shape.description: Fixed model shape; cross-checked against GGUF metadata at load (refusal rule R1). Field names identical to expert_stats.schema.json model_shape.

expert_stats_source.description: Identity of the expert_stats.json capture this manifest was built from. model_hash/corpus_id/capture_date/git_commit use the same field names as the expert_stats.schema.json header.

stats_file_hash.description: SHA256 of the expert_stats.json file itself

model_hash.description: SHA256 of the GGUF model file (copied from stats header)

policy_parameters.description: Named thresholds of spec section 4.2. Values come from f001 measured data; null until supplied.

sensitivity_metric.description: Path into the expert_stats.json record the S thresholds apply to, e.g. 'quantization_sensitivity.Q4_K_M.kld'

nodes.description: Exactly nodes B and C (Node A holds no decode-critical expert weights, Spec v0.3 section 6).

quality_attestation.description: Informational statements that binding rules (spec section 4.3) were applied; the loader re-checks, it does not trust these.

static_cap_bytes.description: Per-node static-weight cap: 33.6 GB (Spec v0.3 section 4)

computed_static_total_bytes.description: Sum of quantized_size_bytes over this node's experts; must equal the recomputed sum (loader refusal rule R2)

layer.description: Layer index (0-93); field name matches expert_stats.schema.json

expert_index.description: Expert index within layer (0-127); field name matches expert_stats.schema.json

quantized_size_bytes.description: Estimated expert weight bytes at quant_type (GGML block arithmetic; spec section 6.2)

quant_type.description: No stats, no downgrade (spec section 4.3 rule 3): never an I-quant without measured stats

stats_file_hash.description: Must equal expert_stats_source.stats_file_hash (loader refusal rule R3)

expert_record_index.description: Index into the stats file's experts array: layer * 128 + expert_index (per expert_stats.schema.json)

frequency_percentile.description: Routing-frequency percentile from activation_fraction distribution; null iff no_stats_default

sensitivity_class.description: Derived via S_HIGH/S_LOW thresholds; null iff no_stats_default

sensitivity_metric.description: Path into the expert_stats.json record that drove sensitivity_class; null iff no_stats_default
